title: Cybianthus quelchii
taxonomy: Cybianthus quelchii is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It belongs to the genus Cybianthus and is native to South America. The classification of Cybianthus quelchii is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiospermophyta), class (Magnoliopsida), and order (Ericales). Within the family Primulaceae, Cybianthus quelchii is part of the tribe Theophrastieae. The exact classification of Cybianthus quelchii may vary depending on the taxonomic source.

Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant is used to treat symptoms like fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues.
